Copied

A delegation of Chinese mainland athletes from the recently concluded Olympics pays a three-day visit to Hong Kong. A series of events have been held, including showcasing the athletes' skills at two demonstrations at Queen Elizabeth Stadium and Victoria Park swimming pool on August 30. CGTN reporter Laura Westbrook has the Hong Kong public's reaction to the delegation's visit.
